Title: Verify empty cart page displays the correct message
Preconditions: User is on the cart page with no items in the cart
Test Steps: 1. Observe the cart page content
Expected Result: Sad face icon is displayed. Message shows the store-specific empty cart message.
Actual Result: Sad face icon is displayed. Message shows the store-specific empty cart message.

Title: Verify cart icon shows zero items when the cart is empty
Preconditions: User has no items in the cart
Test Steps: 1. Observe the cart icon at the top right of the page
Expected Result: Cart icon indicates that the cart is empty (0 items).
Actual Result: Cart icon indicates that the cart is empty (0 items).

Title: Verify simple product can be added to the cart from the product detail page
Preconditions: User is on the simple product page
Test Steps:
1. Click the Add to cart button
2. Observe the cart icon at the top right
Expected Result: Product is added to the cart. Cart icon updates.
Actual Result: Simple product is successfully added to the cart from the product detail page and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Verify simple product can be added to the cart from the shop page
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Click the Add to cart button under a simple product such as T-Shirt
2. Observe the cart icon at the top right
Expected Result: Product is added to the cart. Cart icon updates to reflect the added item.
Actual Result: Simple product is successfully added to the cart from the shop page and cart contents update accordingly.

Title: Verify adding a variable product to the cart displays the selected variant details
Preconditions: User is on the variable product page
Test Steps:
1. Select a colour from the Color dropdown
2. Select a size from the Size dropdown
3. Click Add to cart
4. Navigate to the cart page
5. Observe the product details displayed
Test Data:
Color: any available option
Size: any available option
Expected Result: Product is added to the cart. Cart displays the product name along with the selected colour and size variant details.
Actual Result: Variable product is added to the cart with the selected variant details displayed on the cart page.

Title: Verify multiple different products can be added to the cart
Preconditions: User is on the shop page
Test Steps:
1. Add a Beanie with Logo to the cart
2. Navigate back to the shop
3. Add a T-Shirt to the cart
4. Navigate to the cart page
Expected Result: All added products appear in the cart with correct details and quantities.
Actual Result: Multiple different products are successfully added to the cart and all items are displayed correctly in the cart.

Title: Verify sale product is added to the cart at the discounted price
Preconditions: User is on the simple product page
Test Steps:
1. Click Add to cart
2. Navigate to the cart page
3. Observe the price displayed
Expected Result: Product is added using its configured discounted price and any applicable original price is displayed according to system design.
Actual Result: Sale product is added to the cart at the discounted price and the original price is shown if applicable.

Title: Verify cart page displays all correct product details
Preconditions: User has added simple product to the cart
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the cart page
2. Observe all product details displayed
Expected Result: Cart displays product image, product name as a clickable link, original and sale price, short description, quantity control and delete icon.
Actual Result: Cart page displays all required product details correctly.

Title: Verify cart totals section displays correctly
Preconditions: User has at least one item in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the cart page
2. Observe the Cart Totals section on the right
Expected Result: Cart Totals section displays Add coupons dropdown, Free shipping and Estimated total matching the product total.
Actual Result: Cart Totals section displays subtotal, shipping, discounts and estimated total correctly.

Title: Verify breadcrumb on the cart page displays correctly
Preconditions: User is on the cart page
Test Steps: 1. Observe the breadcrumb at the top of the cart page
Expected Result: Breadcrumb navigation is displayed correctly and reflects the current page.
Actual Result: Breadcrumb navigation is displayed correctly and reflects the current page.

Title: Verify cart items persist after the browser is refreshed
Preconditions: User has at least one item in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Add a product to the cart
2. Navigate to the cart page
3. Note the items and quantities in the cart
4. Refresh the browser
5. Observe the cart
Expected Result: Cart items and quantities remain unchanged after the browser is refreshed.
Actual Result: Cart contents remain intact after refreshing the browser page.

Title: Verify clicking the plus button increases the product quantity by one
Preconditions: User has simple product in the cart with one quantity
Test Steps:
1. Click the plus (+) button on the quantity control
2. Observe the quantity and total
Expected Result: Clicking the plus (+) button increases the product quantity by one and updates the subtotal.
Actual Result: Clicking the plus (+) button increases the product quantity by one and updates the subtotal.

Title: Verify that clicking the minus button decreases the product quantity by one
Preconditions: User has simple product in the cart with two quantity
Test Steps:
1. Click the minus (-) button on the quantity control
2. Observe the quantity and total
Expected Result: Clicking the minus (-) button decreases the product quantity by one and updates the subtotal.
Actual Result: Clicking the minus (-) button decreases the product quantity by one and updates the subtotal.

Title: Verify updating the quantity to three updates the total correctly
Preconditions: User has simple product in the cart with one quantity
Test Steps:
1. Click the plus (+) button twice to increase quantity to 3
2. Observe the total and estimated total
Expected Result: Updating the quantity to three recalculates the subtotal and cart total correctly.
Actual Result: Totals are recalculated correctly when quantity is updated to three.

Title: Verify minus button does not reduce quantity below one
Preconditions: User has simple product in the cart with one quantity
Test Steps:
1. Click the minus button when quantity is already 1
2. Observe the result
Expected Result: Quantity cannot be reduced below one using the minus (-) button.
Actual Result: Quantity remains at one and does not go below one.

Title: Verify entering zero in the quantity field removes the product from the cart
Preconditions: User has at least one item in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Click the quantity field
2. Clear the value and type 0
3. Press enter or click outside the field
4. Observe the result
Expected Result: Product is removed from the cart.
Actual Result: The product is removed from the cart when quantity is set to zero.

Title: Verify clicking the delete icon removes the product from the cart
Preconditions: User has simple product in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Click the delete (bin) icon next to the product
2. Observe the cart
Expected Result: Clicking the delete/remove icon successfully removes the product from the cart.
Actual Result: Product is removed from the cart as expected.

Title: Verify cart icon updates correctly after a product is removed
Preconditions: User has one item in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Click the delete (bin) icon next to the product
2. Observe the cart icon at the top right
Expected Result: Cart icon count decreases appropriately after a product is removed from the cart.
Actual Result: Cart icon count updates correctly after removal.

Title: Verify Add coupons section is expandable on the cart page
Preconditions: User has at least one item in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Click the Add coupons dropdown on the Cart Totals section
2. Observe the result
Expected Result: Add coupons section expands to reveal a coupon code input field.
Actual Result: Add coupon section expands and input is visible.

Title: Verify applying a valid coupon code updates the cart total
Preconditions: User has at least one item in the cart and a valid coupon code exists
Test Steps:
1. Click the Add coupons dropdown
2. Enter a valid coupon code
3. Click Apply
4. Observe the cart total
Expected Result: Coupon is applied. Discount is reflected in the cart total. Estimated total updates accordingly.
Actual Result: Valid coupon code is applied successfully and cart totals update.

Title: Verify applying an invalid coupon code shows an error message
Preconditions: User has at least one item in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Click the Add coupons dropdown
2. Enter an invalid coupon code
3. Click Apply
4. Observe the result
Expected Result: Error message is displayed indicating the coupon code is not valid.
Actual Result: Invalid coupon code displays an appropriate error message and no discount is applied.

Title: Verify free shipping is displayed as FREE in the cart totals
Preconditions: User has at least one item in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the cart page
2. Observe the shipping section in Cart Totals
Expected Result: Free shipping is displayed as FREE in the Cart Totals section.
Actual Result: Free shipping is shown as FREE where applicable.

Title: Verify clicking Proceed to Checkout navigates to the checkout page
Preconditions: User has at least one item in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Click the Proceed to Checkout button
2. Observe the page that loads
Expected Result: User is navigated to the checkout page.
Actual Result: Clicking Proceed to Checkout navigates the user to the Checkout page successfully.

Title: Verify clicking the product name link in the cart navigates to the product detail page
Preconditions: User has at least one item in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Click the product name link in the cart
2. Observe the page that loads
Expected Result: User is navigated to the product detail page for that product.
Actual Result: Clicking the product name link in the cart navigates to the corresponding product detail page.

Title: Verify navigating to the checkout page with an empty cart does not allow checkout to proceed
Preconditions: User has no items in the cart
Test Steps:
1. Ensure the cart is empty
2. Navigate directly to checkout
3. Observe the result
Expected Result: User is redirected away from the checkout page and returned back to cart.
Actual Result: User cannot proceed with checkout when the cart is empty; an appropriate message is displayed.
